'''mapupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beaching|beaching]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beaching|beaching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mapupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæpipith|mæpipith]] || [[word:mæpipij|mæpipij]] || [[word:mæpipish|mæpipish]] || [[word:mæpipi|mæpipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapupuputh|mapupuputh]] || [[word:mapupupuj|mapupupuj]] || [[word:mapupupush|mapupupush]] || [[word:mapupupu|mapupupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapuputh|mapuputh]] || [[word:mapupuj|mapupuj]] || [[word:mapupush|mapupush]] || [[word:mapupu|mapupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapufputh|mapufputh]] || [[word:mapufpuj|mapufpuj]] || [[word:mapufpush|mapufpush]] || [[word:mapufpuf|mapufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mapuputhu|mapuputhu]] || [[word:mapupuju|mapupuju]] || [[word:mapupushu|mapupushu]] || [[word:mapupuku|mapupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mapuputh|mapuputh]] || [[word:mapupuj|mapupuj]] || [[word:mapupush|mapupush]] || [[word:mapupu|mapupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mapuputhul|mapuputhul]] || [[word:mapupujul|mapupujul]] || [[word:mapupushul|mapupushul]] || [[word:mapupukul|mapupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mapuputhuthu|mapuputhuthu]] || [[word:mapupujuju|mapupujuju]] || [[word:mapupushushu|mapupushushu]] || [[word:mapupuku|mapupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mapuputhun|mapuputhun]] || [[word:mapupujun|mapupujun]] || [[word:mapupushun|mapupushun]] || [[word:mapupukun|mapupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mapuputhuoro|mapuputhuoro]] || [[word:mapupujuoro|mapupujuoro]] || [[word:mapupushuoro|mapupushuoro]] || [[word:mapupukuoro|mapupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
